name: com.baseprojectpackages.memoryprofiler
description: Automated memory snapshot capture for the Unity editor and development builds. Takes .snap files on a repeating timer or on scene load, plus on demand from an editor window, so you build a timeline of memory usage without capturing by hand. Snapshots open in Unity's Memory Profiler for single-capture inspection or side-by-side comparison to find leaks and track growth. Config lives in Resources so it ships in development builds. Auto-start is compiled out of release builds where capture is unsupported.
